name: Mohammed Shia al-Sudani
role: Prime Minister of Iraq (2022–present); backed by Coordination Framework; Wasit Province former governor
quote: Our government will fight corruption and restore the state's authority. Iraq's stability depends on balancing our relationships with all regional and international partners.

name: Abdul Latif Rashid
role: President of Iraq (2022–present); Patriotic Union of Kurdistan (PUK); water resources engineer
quote: Iraq's diversity is its strength. The Kurdish people's rights must be guaranteed within a unified federal Iraq that respects its constitution.

name: Nouri al-Maliki
role: Former PM (2006–2014); head of State of Law Coalition; senior Coordination Framework figure; Dawa Party
quote: The political system must be protected from those who seek to undermine it through street pressure or foreign interference. The state must enforce its exclusive monopoly on arms.

name: Muqtada al-Sadr
role: Shia cleric; leader of the Sadrist Movement; son of Ayatollah Mohammad Mohammad Sadeq al-Sadr; controls Saraya al-Salam militia
quote: I call on all Iraqis to rise up against corruption, sectarianism, and foreign interference — whether American or Iranian. Iraq must be for Iraqis.

name: Hadi al-Amiri
role: Head of the Fatah Alliance; former commander of Badr Organization; Iran-aligned PMF/Hashd leader; former Minister of Transport
quote: The Popular Mobilization Forces saved Iraq from ISIS when the army collapsed. They are the backbone of Iraqi sovereignty and cannot be disbanded.

name: Masoud Barzani
role: President of the Kurdistan Democratic Party (KDP); former President of Kurdistan Region (2005–2017); architect of 2017 independence referendum
quote: The independence referendum was a democratic exercise of the Kurdish people's right to self-determination. The response showed the world that we have no friends but the mountains.

name: Nechirvan Barzani
role: President of the Kurdistan Region (2019–present); nephew of Masoud Barzani; KDP; former KRG Prime Minister
quote: The Kurdistan Region is committed to the constitutional framework of federal Iraq. We seek our legitimate rights through dialogue, not confrontation.

name: Masrour Barzani
role: Prime Minister of the Kurdistan Regional Government (2019–present); son of Masoud Barzani; former head of KRG intelligence (Asayish)
quote: Kurdistan's security forces have been indispensable to the fight against ISIS. Our investment climate is the most stable in Iraq. We will not accept budget discrimination.

name: Mohammed al-Halbousi
role: Former Speaker of the Council of Representatives (2018–2023); Taqadum Party; Anbar Province; removed by Federal Supreme Court in November 2023
quote: Sunni Iraqis have been marginalized for too long. We demand equal representation, reconstruction of Anbar and Mosul, and an end to arbitrary arrests by PMF-affiliated forces.

name: Faleh Fayyad
role: National Security Advisor; Chairman of the Popular Mobilization Forces Commission (Hashd); former head of Coordination Framework; Iran-aligned
quote: The Hashd al-Shaabi are a constitutional institution of the Iraqi state, not a militia. They operate under state authority and have sacrificed thousands in defense of Iraq.

name: Grand Ayatollah Ali al-Sistani
role: Senior Marjayia; Supreme religious authority for the world's Shia Muslims (~200 million); Iranian-born; based in Najaf; issued 2014 fatwa mobilizing PMF against ISIS
quote: Citizens who are able to bear arms and fight terrorists must volunteer to defend their country, their people, and their holy sites. [June 2014 fatwa against ISIS]

name: Haider al-Abadi
role: Former Prime Minister (2014–2018); leader of Victory Alliance; replaced Maliki after ISIS crisis; oversaw ISIS territorial defeat in 2017
quote: We have liberated our land, we have won. Now we must win the peace — through reconciliation, reconstruction, and economic development for all Iraqis.

name: Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis
role: Former Deputy Chairman of PMF Commission; founder of Kata'ib Hezbollah; killed in US drone strike with Soleimani on January 3, 2020 at Baghdad Airport
quote: The Americans have made a strategic mistake. Every drop of blood of the martyrs will be avenged. The resistance will remain until all foreign forces leave our land.

name: Mustafa al-Kadhimi
role: Former Prime Minister (2020–2022); former intelligence chief; independent technocrat; survived assassination attempt via drone in November 2021
quote: The era of impunity for those who kill Iraqi protesters must end. The state must reassert its exclusive authority over arms and bring justice to the families of the martyrs.

name: Barham Salih
role: Former President of Iraq (2018–2022); former KRG PM; Patriotic Union of Kurdistan (PUK); economist and governance reformer
quote: Iraq needs a social contract that transcends sectarianism. The youth of Tishreen are telling us the old political order has failed them — we must listen or face continued instability.
